# KRITIKAAL
> Managed Leather Manufacturing from India for the World

KRITIKAAL is India's managed leather manufacturing partner for global fashion brands.

We handle:
- sample development
- factory selection
- leather sourcing
- AQL quality control
- REACH/CA65/Oeko-Tex compliance
- export logistics

Manufacturing clusters:
- Agra
- Kanpur
- Kolkata

Products:
- leather footwear
- leather bags
- leather wallets
- leather belts
- leather garments
- leather accessories

MOQ:
From 300 units.

Lead time:
45–60 days for bulk manufacturing.

Key Pages:
- /
- /about
- /how-it-works
- /products
- /faq
- /blog
- /request-sample
- /bookacall

Website:
https://www.kritikaal.com
